stemHtml:
Which interpretation of this D-ATIS is correct?

WSSS Dep ATIS F 0130 METAR Exp ILS Apch segregated PARL Ops in use ARR RWY 02L DEP 02C...

options.a: Runway 02L is for departures; visibility 10 km+; wind 010° at 4 kt.
options.b: ATIS for departing and arriving traffic; RWY 02C for departures; no significant changes.
options.c: ICAO code WSSS; taxiway E3 southbound closed; clouds reported at multiple layers.
options.d: ATIS F is current; temperature 26°C; no significant weather changes expected.
